templates.title: Surgical Procedure Education
templates.description: 3D anatomy visualization with step-by-step surgical technique demonstration
templates.prompt: Create a professional surgical education video featuring anatomically accurate 3D models. Show precise surgical techniques with step-by-step progression, highlighting critical anatomical landmarks. Include multiple viewing angles, cross-sectional views, and detailed instrument movements. Use clinical lighting with clear visibility. Add medical terminology annotations, measurement guides, and risk area indicators. Maintain sterile field representation and professional medical standards.

templates.title: Patient Care Journey
templates.description: Hospital admission to recovery timeline with compassionate care focus
templates.prompt: Create an empathetic visualization of a patient's complete care journey from hospital admission through recovery. Show key touchpoints: registration, initial assessment, diagnostic procedures, treatment planning, therapeutic interventions, and discharge planning. Use warm, reassuring colors with smooth transitions between phases. Include supportive healthcare professionals, family involvement, and patient comfort measures. Emphasize continuity of care, communication, and positive outcomes while maintaining patient dignity and privacy.

visual_elements.lighting: Natural daylight mixed with clinical LED

templates.title: Medical Technology Demo
templates.description: MRI, robotic surgery, AI diagnostics demonstration
templates.prompt: Showcase cutting-edge medical technology in clinical settings. Feature MRI and CT scanners in operation with clear visualization of imaging processes. Demonstrate robotic surgery systems with precision movements and surgeon console interaction. Show AI diagnostic tools analyzing medical images, identifying patterns, and providing decision support. Include real-time data visualization, holographic displays, and integrated health information systems. Emphasize technology enhancing patient care and clinical outcomes.

templates.title: Mental Health Awareness
templates.description: Supportive visuals for mental health destigmatization
templates.prompt: Create compassionate mental health awareness content with supportive, non-triggering visuals. Use calming nature scenes, abstract representations of emotional wellness, and gentle color transitions. Show diverse individuals engaging in self-care, therapy sessions (respectfully portrayed), and community support activities. Include positive messaging about seeking help, recovery journeys, and breaking stigma. Emphasize hope, resilience, and the importance of mental health care as essential healthcare.

templates.title: Pharmaceutical Development
templates.description: Lab to patient medication journey visualization
templates.prompt: Illustrate the complete pharmaceutical development journey from laboratory research to patient delivery. Show molecular discovery, preclinical testing, clinical trial phases, regulatory approval, manufacturing, and distribution. Feature scientists in lab settings, automated production lines, quality control processes, and pharmacy dispensing. Use clear data visualization for trial results and safety protocols. Emphasize rigorous testing, patient safety measures, and the collaborative effort behind medication development.

templates.title: Physical Therapy Exercises
templates.description: Proper form demonstration with recovery progression
templates.prompt: Create clear instructional videos for physical therapy exercises showing proper form and technique. Feature certified therapists demonstrating exercises for various conditions: post-surgical recovery, sports injuries, chronic pain management, and mobility improvement. Use multiple camera angles to show correct positioning, common mistakes to avoid, and modifications for different ability levels. Include anatomical overlays showing targeted muscle groups, range of motion indicators, and progression milestones.

templates.title: Healthcare Facility Tour
templates.description: Modern equipment and patient amenities showcase
templates.prompt: Produce a comprehensive virtual tour of a state-of-the-art healthcare facility. Showcase modern patient rooms with smart monitoring systems, advanced diagnostic imaging suites, surgical theaters with robotic assistance, rehabilitation centers, and healing gardens. Highlight patient comfort features, family accommodation areas, and accessibility design. Include wayfinding systems, infection control measures, and emergency response capabilities. Feature staff interaction areas and collaborative care spaces.

templates.title: Telemedicine Consultation
templates.prompt: Demonstrate modern telemedicine consultation platforms and workflows. Show patient app interface with appointment scheduling, virtual waiting room, and secure video consultation. Feature doctor's digital workspace with electronic health records integration, diagnostic tool sharing, and e-prescription capabilities. Include remote monitoring device integration, real-time vital signs display, and secure messaging features. Emphasize convenience, accessibility, and continuity of care through digital health solutions.

templates.title: Emergency Response Training
templates.description: CPR and first aid procedures demonstration
templates.prompt: Create comprehensive emergency response training videos covering CPR techniques, automated external defibrillator (AED) use, and essential first aid procedures. Show step-by-step demonstrations with clear hand positioning, compression depth indicators, and timing guides. Include scenarios for adults, children, and infants. Feature choking response, wound care, and stabilization techniques. Use multiple angles, slow-motion for critical movements, and on-screen checklists for protocol adherence.

templates.title: Wellness Checkup Guide
templates.description: Preventive care and health screening education
templates.prompt: Develop educational content about routine wellness checkups and preventive health screenings. Show various screening procedures: blood pressure monitoring, cholesterol testing, cancer screenings, vision and hearing tests, and immunization schedules. Feature diverse age groups and their recommended health maintenance activities. Include lifestyle counseling segments on nutrition, exercise, and stress management. Emphasize the importance of regular checkups in early detection and disease prevention.
